falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes below the 200-day moving average by more than 3% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown of key support invalidates the bottom pattern and suggests continued bearish momentum, contradicting the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% above the 30-day average on a single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Excessive selling pressure would indicate a blowoff top, directly contradicting the current HOLD and suggesting a reversal in trend.

falsification_conditions.condition: The unemployment rate rises above 5.5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant economic deterioration would invalidate the bottom pattern by introducing fundamental risks that contradict the current market call.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
